About Me

Crafting Digital Experiences

I'm a frontend engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I focus on creating accessible, performant interfaces that solve real problems and feel great to use.

My work spans component libraries, design systems, and full-stack React applications. I care deeply about clean code, testing, and helping teams ship with confidence.

Work

Featured Projects

Internet Banking Platform

Built a full-featured internet banking interface for FCMB UK — account management, transactions, and compliance workflows serving thousands of daily users.

ReactNext.jsTypeScriptREST APIsJest

Component Design System

Created a shared component library with 50+ accessible, themeable components, Storybook documentation, and automated visual regression testing.

ReactTailwind CSSStorybookTypeScriptnpm

My Tasks — Todo App

A task manager with productivity stats, filters, sorting, tags, priorities, optional due dates, search, and a clean dashboard-style UI.

ReactNext.jsTypeScriptTailwind CSS

Play Tic, Tac, Toe

A browser-based two-player Tic-Tac-Toe game with editable player names, game status messaging, and a clean UI built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

HTMLCSSJavaScript

Real-Time Analytics Dashboard

Developed an analytics dashboard with live-updating charts, filterable data tables, and exportable reports for internal stakeholders.

ReactRechartsZustandWebSocketsNode.js

Cross-Platform Mobile App

Shipped a React Native app with offline-first architecture, background sync, push notifications, and biometric auth across iOS and Android.

React NativeFirebaseReduxTypeScriptExpo

ROVA

Tech Service
